title: Automation -Everytime has no Quarterly and Yearly
excerpt:
Hi Experts, 
I need your advice on settup up Automation with Everytime… There are only Daily, Weekly and monthly are available. How can we set it up with Quarterly and Yearly. 
Regards Kevin

posts.author: kevin_jun (kevin jun)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Experts,
I need your advice on settup up Automation with Everytime… There are only Daily, Weekly and monthly are available. How can we set it up with Quarterly and Yearly.

posts.author: LaunchMe (Shawna Culp)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kevin,

I’ve worked around this by using “Monthly every 3 months” for quarterly, and “monthly every 12 months” for annually. Would that work for you?

Happy monday Monday

posts.author: kevin_jun (kevin jun)
posts.cookedHtml: It is a great idea…Superb… Thanks Shawna…Will take it up… Rgds Kevin

posts.author: Ben_Muncaster (Ben )
posts.cookedHtml: Problem is they dont give you a start date option so every automation assume its a quarter beginning in january. ie if you put every three months/qtr but wanted it to be Feb/May/Aug/Nov it won’t do it because it does it from Jan which is annoying to say the least. Its such a simple rule but they are not interested in fixing it
